title: OPENAI / ANTHROPIC provisioning
required_action: Provide API keys for openai_reasoning_adapter and claude_critic_adapter.
why_matters: Enables critic evaluation and active reasoning lanes.
safe_steps:
1. Retrieve keys from OpenAI and Anthropic developer consoles.
2. Store them locally in the specified config files.
risk_if_deferred: Swarm is restricted to local/fallback simulation modes only.

title: Apple Developer access
required_action: Register Apple Developer Account and generate team invitation.
why_matters: Awaiting App Store Connect integration credentials.
blocking_what: App Store listing and binary signing registration.
safe_steps:
1. Go to developer.apple.com and complete registration.
2. Invite agent email under App Store Connect Users list.
risk_if_deferred: Preflight binaries cannot be deployed to TestFlight.

title: App Store Connect and bundle ID
required_action: Create App ID and configure bundle name com.hasf.rmfcompanion.
blocking_what: TestFlight upload and Xcode build profile matching.
safe_steps:
1. Create identifier com.hasf.rmfcompanion under Apple Developer Certificates list.
2. Create App entry in App Store Connect portal.
risk_if_deferred: Xcode builds will reject packaging code due to bundle mismatch.

title: signing certificates / provisioning profiles
required_action: Generate iOS Distribution Certificates and App Store Provisioning Profiles.
why_matters: Authenticates the binary for Apple review.
safe_steps:
1. Generate CSR from Keychain and upload to Apple portal.
2. Download iOS Distribution Certificate and Provisioning Profile.
3. Install in developer Keychain.
risk_if_deferred: App cannot be installed on iOS devices or submitted for review.

title: remote host credential posture
required_action: Provision SSH public keys and droplet connection parameters.
why_matters: Secures connection to the always-on server.
blocking_what: Production deployment of the autonomy daemon to HOCH-200.
safe_steps:
1. Create SSH key pair.
2. Install public key on HOCH-200 authorized_keys.
3. Save access config locally.
risk_if_deferred: Daemon cannot run on bare metal, forcing local session dependency.

title: secrets inventory
required_action: Review and approve the repository secrets list.
why_matters: Prevents credential leaks in git history.
blocking_what: Clean tree tagging for release candidates.
safe_steps:
1. Run scan scripts on local .env and config folders.
2. Approve gitignore list.
risk_if_deferred: High risk of accidental exposure of API keys.
